---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change that fits the agent-first scope
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

<!-- What can't an agent / script do today that it should? -->

**Proposed surface**

<!-- New subcommand, flag, schema field — be concrete -->

**Scope check**

- [ ] This change does not introduce a TUI, themes, or human-only decoration
- [ ] This change does not add audio, bookmarks, plans, or sermon prep
- [ ] If schema is touched, I understand it requires a snapshot test and CHANGELOG entry

**Alternatives considered**

<!-- Any -->
